vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current visual data. The pots contain soil and debris, but no identifiable foliage or living plant matter is visible in any of the containers.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No String of Nickels visible.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No Mexican Mint visible.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: No Pothos visible. White rabbit anchor is present but the plant is absent.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No Silver Guest visible.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil surface; no vegetative growth detected.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty soil surface; no vegetative growth detected.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains white rabbit anchor; soil surface is bare.
plant_audit.P4_Shared_Black_Pot: Empty soil surface; no vegetative growth detected.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark, damp, and undisturbed across all images.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Presence of white, crystalline-like debris (possibly perlite or mineral salt buildup) on the surface of the black pots. No fungal blooms observed.

temporal_deltas.T_minus_4_to_T_minus_1: Static state. No growth or decay observed as the subjects were already absent/non-viable.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_1_to_Current: Lighting shift observed (T-1 was under low-light/UV-dominant conditions), revealing the same empty soil state as previous days.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological failure. There is no evidence of photosynthetic activity or plant life in any of the registered pots.
vision_report.anomalies: The persistent presence of the white rabbit anchor in an otherwise empty pot suggests a static, non-living display or a failed propagation attempt.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. My first step was to establish a baseline for each pot based on the registry, followed by a pixel-by-pixel scan of the soil surfaces to detect any signs of life. I validated these findings by comparing the temporal stack, which confirms that the pots have remained empty throughout the observation period. The biome is currently devoid of any plant specimens, rendering the registry obsolete in terms of current occupancy. The environment appears to be a dormant or failed botanical setup.
